x-enumeration-literals.name: Custodian
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The party that safekeeps and administers assets on behalf of the owner.
https://www.iso20022.org/standardsrepository/type/CustodianRole

A financial institution that holds customers' securities for safekeeping to prevent them from being stolen or lost.
https://www.investopedia.com/terms/c/custodian.asp

x-enumeration-literals.name: Sub-custodian
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A sub-custodian is a sub-contractor appointed by a main custodian as part of its custody network, to hold client assets on behalf of a main custodian - usually to carry out functions that the main custodian cant. for example, to hold assets in a jurisdiction where the main custodian has no licence to do so.

https://jollycontrarian.com/index.php?title=Sub-custodian
